description: DataFrame.copy(deep=True)→deep=False: shallow copy shares underlying data in pandas <2.0

_meta.explanation: In pandas < 2.0, copy(deep=False) creates a shallow copy that shares the data blocks. A direct in-place mutation via iloc on df2 modifies the shared block, changing df1 too. In pandas >= 2.0 with Copy-on-Write, this would NOT affect df1.
_meta.curriculum_note: Level 2. Version-sensitive: CoW in pandas 2.0 changes this behavior.
_meta.generation_recipe: pandas_mc injection: DataFrame.copy(deep=True)→deep=False: shallow copy shares underlying data in pandas <2.0
